expected_action: read specs/AGENTS.md and the affected consumer guides before writing server and SDK files
directive: For cross-cutting changes spanning spec, server, and SDKs, start with specs/AGENTS.md and then read affected consumer guides.

content: Add a pause deadline field to the sandbox lifecycle API. This needs the spec, server, and Python SDK aligned.

content.text: This is a cross-cutting API change, so I will start with the spec guide.
I will read the server consumer guide next.
I will read the SDK consumer guide before touching the SDK.
I will add the server-side pause deadline helper.
I will add the matching SDK helper.

input.content:
def pause_deadline_payload(deadline_seconds: int | None) -> dict[str, int | None]:
    return {'deadlineSeconds': deadline_seconds}
